user.title: Samsung Family Hub
user.description: Choose how to connect to your Family Hub refrigerator.

oauth.title: Select your Family Hub
oauth.description: Select your SmartThings integration and choose your Family Hub refrigerator from the list.

samsung_iot.title: Samsung Account authentication
samsung_iot.description: Camera image downloads require a Samsung Account token separate from SmartThings. Choose how to provide it.

menu_options.samsung_credentials: Sign in with Samsung Account email and password (no 2FA)
menu_options.samsung_token: Paste a Samsung IoT refresh token (required for 2FA accounts)

samsung_credentials.title: Samsung Account
samsung_credentials.description: Enter your Samsung Account credentials. 2FA must be disabled on this account.

samsung_token.title: Samsung IoT refresh token
samsung_token.description: Paste your Samsung IoT refresh token captured from browser dev tools.

error.invalid_samsung_auth: Invalid Samsung Account email or password.
error.samsung_2fa: 2FA is enabled — use the refresh token option instead.
error.invalid_samsung_token: The Samsung IoT refresh token is invalid or expired.

abort.already_configured: This Family Hub is already configured.
